Name: EXAMPLE - delete on first real entry
Notes: Purchased/external part registry (process-options.md "purchased parts"): one row per bought part that no repo builds. IF-Ref names the interface row that is its owner-of-record (MULTI_REPO.md §3.3 — a coordinator/repo-held IF-### links the datasheet/vendor); trace.py flags a malformed PART- id. Status=needed|ordered|on-hand|backordered|obsolete. Cost/Quantity are plain numbers; Vendor links the source/datasheet. Optional, like interfaces.csv/PB — a project that buys nothing ignores this file. Full BOM tracking (alternates, per-module allocation, roll-ups) is a deferred extension.
